public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quiet operative.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a quiet operative still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quiet operative in and around Guild Sanction Board, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Guild Sanction Board workable through the obligations of quiet operative while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Guild Sanction Board, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of quiet operative visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Orin Hearthmark can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Orin Hearthmark can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Orin Hearthmark carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Guild Sanction Board: the part of Guild Sanction Board where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
